detail.description: Our low rate home loan comes with a great range of features to help you pay off your home sooner.
detail.name: Goldrate Home Loan

features.additionalInfo: Available for the ACT Land Rent Scheme
Not Available for Fixed Loans or Interest Only
Unlimited free additional repayments - Up to $9,999 per calendar year for the fixed term

fees.name: Substituting Securities fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable to us when you substitute an existing property with a new property as security for your home loan.

fees.name: Legal/Securities fees
fees.additionalInfo: At Cost.

fees.name: Stamp Duty Increase Fee
fees.additionalInfo: At Cost. Payable at the rate charged by the Office of State Revenue or its interstate counterparts when topping up an existing loan where the original stamp duty is not sufficient; when payable by law.

fees.name: Substituting of Security Legal fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable to us when you substitute an existing property with a new property as security for your home loan.

fees.name: Monthly Product Split Fee
fees.additionalInfo: $7 per additional product per month during the period of the split, debited to the account for the other product each month.

fees.name: Consent to Subdivision Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when you ask for our consent to register a subdivision or other plan or dealing.

fees.name: Mortgage Discharge Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when you ask us to prepare a discharge of mortgage. Note: This fee does not include registration costs for the land titles office

fees.name: Bridging Home Loan Establishment Fee
fees.additionalInfo: For Bridging Loans only

fees.name: Late Payment Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Charged where the whole or any part of your loan repayment remains unpaid after 14 days past the due date. Applies to all Police Bank loans and continuing credit accounts

fees.name: Second Mortgage Consent Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when you ask us to consent to a second mortgage

fees.name: Future Legal Costs and Disbursements Relating to any Variations, Dealings, Discharges
fees.additionalInfo: At Cost. Payable to our solicitors when we incur costs in the enforcement of your contract. The costs may include court costs, legal costs, repossession costs and administrative costs.

fees.name: Default Notice Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when we send you a default notice under a loan contract when an arrears remains unremedied after we have sent you an arrears letter.

fees.name: PPSR Fees (Personal Properties Security Register)
fees.additionalInfo: At Cost. Certain loans will require us to use the services of PPSR. If we do so, the following may be payable; PPSR Registration Fee, PPSR Financier Interest Enquiry and PPSR Variation of Interest.

fees.name: Production of Title Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable to our solicitors when you ask us to produce the certificate of title of your property to enable registration of a plan or any document dealing with your property

fees.name: Additional Statement Fee
fees.additionalInfo: $5.00 + $1.50 per page, payable when you request an additional statement.

fees.name: General Consent Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when you ask for our consent to any matter relating to a loan contract or security (other than a matter for which a separate fee is payable).

fees.name: Other Government Duties & Taxes
fees.additionalInfo: At Cost. Any applicable Government Taxes, Duties and Fees will be passed on to you.

fees.name: Excess Valuation Fee
fees.additionalInfo: At Cost. Payable if and when the costs of valuing your security property/ies exceeds $300 in aggregate over the term of the loan. Calculated as an amount of the excess.

fees.name: Arrears Letter Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when we send you an arrears letter asking you to remedy an arrears under a loan contract.

fees.name: Other Legal/ Solicitors Fees
fees.additionalInfo: At Cost. Payable to our solicitors when you ask us to take any action in respect of the loan or your property and we incur legal fees.

fees.name: Insurance
fees.additionalInfo: At Cost. Insurance requirements may vary from applicant to applicant. Any compulsory insurance requirements will be advised on application. For example, you may be required to pay for Lenders Mortgage Insurance; and must pay mortgage property and Motor Vehicle Insurance.

fees.name: Additional Valuation Fee
fees.additionalInfo: At Cost. Payable to our valuer if more than one security is required for your loan and/or when application is made for additional finance and/or altering the title of the property or the property itself and Police Bank Loan policy dictates that a subsequent valuation is required.

fees.name: Third Party Costs
fees.additionalInfo:
Any other costs charged to us by a third party will be passed on to you. Some examples are as follows:
• Title Change Fee
• Land and Property Information Search Fees
• Land and Property Information Registration Fees

fees.name: Stamp Duty
fees.additionalInfo: At Cost. Payable at the rate charged by the Office of State Revenue or its interstate counterparts when payable by law.

fees.name: RTGS Transfer Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when we are required to transfer settlement funds to an agent on behalf of our Solicitor.

fees.name: Issue of Statutory Default Notice Legal Fees
Pest & Building Inspections Fees
fees.additionalInfo: At Cost. Payable to inspectors if we require a pest or building inspection.

fees.name: Mortgage Loan Top Up / Increase in Credit Limit Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable on application or funding. Applies to all Home Loan Applications

fees.name: Independent Legal Advice/Interpreter Service
fees.additionalInfo: At Cost. You may be advised to seek independent legal advice or interpreter services. If so, you will be charged a fee by the service provider.

fees.name: Early Repayment Fee
fees.additionalInfo:
Early Repayment Fee payable, if, during any fixed rate period, you:
(a)	repay the whole of your unpaid balance (full early repayment);
(b)	pay $5000 or more in repayments above the contractual repayments (partial early repayment); or
(c)	become obliged to repay the whole loan after you have defaulted (full early repayment)

and the fixed rate that applied to the loan is more than the prevailing market interest rate at the time of the early repayment, as determined by us in our absolute discretion.
